news.headline: Richard Webber of CertaPro Painters of Morristown, NJ wins 2024 IFA Franchisee of the Year. LAS VEGAS, Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Morristown, NJ, Richard Webber, the owner of CertaPro Painters, was awarded the prestigious title of 2024 Franchisee of the Year by the International Franchise Association (IFA). This recognition was given in Las Vegas on February 13, 2025. Webber's exceptional performance in franchising earned him this honor, showcasing his dedication and success in the industry.

news.headline: Royal Credit Union chooses Alogent's Unify Platform for efficiency, with $5.3 billion in assets. #banking #efficiency #technology
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Alogent, a prominent software company specializing in banking and financial services, revealed through social media that Royal Credit Union, based in Eau Claire, WI, with assets exceeding $5.3 billion, has chosen their services.

news.headline: US Renal Care launches "The Nightingale Program" to help team members become nephrology nurses. Industry-leading initiative.
news.summary: "The Nightingale Program" offers significant advantages to healthcare providers seeking career advancement opportunities. Taking place in Plano, Texas, as of February 13, 2025, this program is hosted by U.S. Renal Care (USRC), recognized as the top dialysis provider with remarkable growth rates nationwide and exceptional standards in clinical care and patient satisfaction.

news.headline: U.S. product recalls hit second-highest in 6 years with over 3,200 events in 2024 - Sedgwick analysis.
news.summary: Sedgwick brand protection recently published a comprehensive analysis of recall data from 2024. The report reveals that the United States experienced over 3,200 product recalls for the second year in a row. This indicates a persistent high level of recall activity in the country. The analysis was released from Memphis, Tennessee on Feb. 13, 2025, by Sedgwick brand protection.

news.headline: 2024 CEO Pinnacle Awards winners announced by Chief Executives Council after a judging process starting in October 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 13, 2025, the recipients of the 2024 CEO Pinnacle™ Awards were announced following a thorough evaluation that commenced in October 2024. These awards, organized by the Chief Executives Council, a prominent community and platform promoting excellence in business leadership, aim to recognize outstanding individuals in the industry.

news.headline: Jan de Leon named new President & CEO of TÜV SÜD Americas, effective Feb 1, 2025, replacing Dr. Fabian Schober.
news.summary: Jan de Leon has been named as President & CEO of the Americas region for TÜV SÜD starting February 1, 2025. He will be based in Wakefield, Massachusetts and will be overseeing the growth, innovation, and strategic development of the region. He takes over from Dr. Fabian Schober, who recently departed from the company. With a background in finance, strategy, and business transformation, Jan de Leon has shown strong leadership skills since he joined in 2018.

news.headline: MDCE / Infinite Auctions has amassed a multi-million dollar inventory of sports memorabilia from iconic players like LeBron, Kobe, Iverson, and Jordan.
news.summary: A company based in Mesa, Arizona, known as Medical Care Technologies Inc. and Infinite Auctions, has assembled a valuable inventory worth millions of dollars. This collection consists of game-used memorabilia from renowned sports figures including LeBron James, Kobe Bryant, Allen Iverson, and Michael Jordan. The company's stock is listed as OTC PINK: MDCE.

news.headline: Gen Digital Inc. plans to offer $1.1 billion in senior notes to support Digital Freedom.
news.summary: In Tempe, Arizona and Prague, on February 13, 2025, Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GEN), a prominent global company focused on promoting Digital Freedom through various consumer brands, disclosed its intention to offer $1,100 million in senior notes due for sale.

news.headline: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. announces breakthrough in optimizing quantum computing using DeepSeek model.- Company: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO)- Date: Feb. 13, 2025- Location: SHENZHEN, China
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on February 13, 2025, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO) unveiled their latest innovation, the DeepSeek model, signaling a significant advancement in digital simulated technology. The technology service provider has made a notable breakthrough in this field, expanding their capabilities to offer more intricate and immersive experiences. This development highlights the company's commitment to pushing boundaries and enhancing their offerings.

news.headline: Greenwald Davidson Radbil PLLC secures $55 million for consumers from unwanted robocalls in the past 6 months.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, as of February 13, 2025, boutique law firm Greenwald Davidson Radbil PLLC has successfully helped consumers in Boca Raton and Austin receive over $55 million in the last half-year due to unwanted robocalls. Through class action settlements, the firm has been able to secure compensation for individuals impacted by these illegal calls.

news.headline: Mintify acquires Magically.gg to expand digital asset ecosystem, marking first major acquisition. Merging brands for consumer applications growth.
news.summary: In a recent development, Mintify, a leading platform for onchain trading, has successfully completed the acquisition of Magically.gg from Redacted. This strategic move marks Mintify's inaugural major acquisition as part of its expansion strategy to enhance its brand and infrastructure with a stronger focus on consumer-oriented applications. Through this acquisition, Mintify adds a significant player in digital asset trading to its portfolio, further enriching its ecosystem of onchain offerings for consumers. This acquisition underscores Mintify's commitment to growing and diversifying its range of products and services.

news.headline: Regions Bank introduces Regions Embedded ERP Finance to assist Treasury Management clients in optimizing cash flow, liquidity, and reducing risks. Powered by Koxa, this tool connects financial data to ERP systems, allowing better anticipation of business needs.
news.summary: Regions Bank unveiled a new tool called Regions Embedded ERP Finance aimed at assisting Treasury Management customers in enhancing cash flow management, liquidity optimization, risk reduction, and forecasting business requirements. By teaming up with Koxa, this solution enables clients to efficiently link financial information with their enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems. This integration offers improved insight into financial data and business processes. This move signifies Regions Bank's commitment to providing innovative solutions for its customers, further solidifying its position as a leader in the finance sector.

news.headline: Expensify (Nasdaq: EXFY) to share Q4 and full year fiscal 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025 after market close. Call at 2pm PT.
news.summary: Expensify, Inc., a payments superapp listed on Nasdaq under the symbol EXFY, has revealed that its financial results for Q4 and the full year of fiscal 2024 will be disclosed after market hours on Thursday, February 27th, 2025. The company will conduct a call to review these results on the same day at 2pm PT / 5pm ET. Expensify offers services that simplify money management for individuals and businesses worldwide, covering expenses, corporate cards, and bills.

news.headline: Dr. Fred Moll, known as the "father of surgical robotics," joins ForSight Robotics board of directors; two new VP appointments made.
news.summary: ForSight Robotics, a company based in Yokneam Illit, Israel, has recently bolstered its leadership team by welcoming Dr. Fred Moll, renowned as the "father of surgical robotics," to its Board of Directors. The company has also announced the appointments of a new Vice President of Research and Development as well as a Vice President responsible for People. This move is aimed at enhancing the company's expertise in the field of robotic surgery and innovation.

news.headline: Global Genomic Data Analysis market set to reach $5.89 billion by 2033 with new tools enhancing precision medicine and cancer care.
news.summary: The market report titled "Genomic Data Analysis and Interpretation Market Opportunities and Strategies to 2033" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. Covering the historic period of 2018-2023 and the forecast period of 2023-2028, extending to 2033, the report delves into the genomic data analysis and interpretation market. It provides an evaluation of the market on a regional level and for key economies within each region. The global genomic data analysis and interpretation market is comprehensively analyzed in the report.

news.headline: SEALSQ Corp integrates WISeAI’s decentralized model for next-gen AI and quantum security platform.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Geneva, Switzerland, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) revealed its plan to incorporate WISeAI’s decentralized model into its comprehensive quantum platform. SEALSQ specializes in the production and distribution of Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software solutions. This collaboration aims to establish a secure and transparent Artificial Intelligence system enhanced by quantum computing. The integration will ensure fairness and security in AI processes while leveraging quantum capabilities.

news.headline: Help Scout now available in AWS Marketplace, offering customer support platform for growing businesses.
news.summary: Help Scout, a customer support platform catering to growing businesses, revealed that its services are now accessible through AWS Marketplace. AWS Marketplace features numerous software listings from various independent software vendors to simplify the process of locating, testing, purchasing, and implementing software compatible with Amazon Web Services (AWS). Help Scout's platform, offering unlimited users and AI capabilities, aids small businesses in effectively handling customer communications across email and social media platforms.

news.headline: Tony Roma's ranked #2 in 2025 Newsweek Excellence Index among restaurants & cafés. Globally recognized.
news.summary: Tony Roma's has been recognized as a top performer in the 2025 Newsweek Excellence Index, cementing its position among industry leaders. The renowned restaurant chain, known for its exceptional dining experience and signature ribs, achieved this significant recognition. The achievement was announced on February 13, 2025, in Orlando, Florida. This acknowledgment solidifies Tony Roma's standing in the industry, reflecting its commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Emergency physicians from ACEP provide tips for recognizing signs of a heart attack and knowing when to seek help.
news.summary: In February 2025, the American College of Emergency Physicians (ACEP) is providing guidelines as part of American Heart Month to raise awareness about detecting symptoms of a heart attack. It is crucial not to overlook warning signals of a heart attack and to promptly seek medical attention when necessary. If experiencing symptoms such as chest pain, shortness of breath, or discomfort in other areas of the upper body, it is recommended to call emergency services immediately or visit the emergency department. Taking quick action can be life-saving, as around 805,000 Americans have heart attacks annually, with approximately 605,000 being first-time occurrences. By recognizing the signs early and seeking timely medical intervention, individuals can significantly improve their chances of recovery and survival.

news.headline: Kiddom launches new K-12 math curriculum in South Carolina aligning with 2025 standards for excellence.
news.summary: A recently introduced K-12 math curriculum in South Carolina aims to enhance student education by aligning with the 2025 College and Career Ready Mathematics Standards. The curriculum, implemented by Kiddom, a leading education tech company, focuses on providing a comprehensive learning experience. This initiative is designed to improve math education standards in the region, with a particular emphasis on preparing students for college and their future careers. The program, launched on February 13, 2025, in Columbia, South Carolina, reflects a commitment to excellence in education and ensuring students are equipped with the necessary skills to succeed.

news.headline: OOFOS signs first NIL deal with South Carolina Highlighters practice squad, a historic partnership.
news.summary: In an unprecedented move, OOFOS, a leading brand in Active Recovery footwear, has secured the first NIL deal with a practice squad. This groundbreaking partnership has been established with the Highlighters, a practice team affiliated with the Women's Basketball Program at South Carolina. The deal, which marks a significant milestone in the world of sports marketing, was confirmed in Braintree, Massachusetts on February 13, 2025. This collaboration sets a new standard in NIL agreements, demonstrating OOFOS' commitment to innovation and supporting athletes at all levels.

news.headline: York Space Systems in Denver launches commercial services program for government space missions on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: A Denver-based aerospace company called York Space Systems (York) is launching an on-demand commercial service tailored for operationally critical government space missions. This initiative aims to offer a scalable and cost-effective pathway for these missions. The service is set to be introduced on Feb. 13, 2025. York Space Systems specializes in providing rapid deployment solutions for complete space missions.

news.headline: HGTV® Dream Home 2025 sweepstakes in Bluffton, SC closes on 2/14, with prize valued at $2.2 million.
news.summary: The victor of the HGTV Dream Home 2025 sweepstakes in Bluffton, South Carolina will be awarded a prize package exceeding $2.2 million. Closing on Friday, February 14, 2025, at 5 p.m. ET, the dream home comes with a lavish prize package worth over $2.2 million.

news.headline: Ginza Sony Park opened on Jan 26, 2025 in Tokyo, redefining public park concept with open, urban setting.
news.summary: In Ginza, Tokyo, a unique public park called Ginza Sony Park officially opened on January 26, 2025. This park, located in the vibrant Ginza neighborhood, offers a fresh perspective on traditional park spaces. Ginza Sony Park stands out as a space designed for unrestricted public access, aiming to redefine the typical park experience. Through its innovative approach, it aims to bring together various elements to create a dynamic environment that reflects the spirit of the city.

news.headline: MOBILion Systems to showcase new PAMAF Operating Mode at US HUPO 2025 in Philadelphia from Feb. 22-26.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Chadds Ford, Pennsylvania, MOBILion Systems, Inc., known for its advancements in separation science, revealed its involvement in the 21st Annual US HUPO Conference scheduled for February 22-26, 2025, in Philadelphia. The company will exhibit its latest Parallel technology at the event.

news.headline: Italian Economy Minister: The government plans to adopt measures in next few weeks to address issue of rising energy prices.
Hometap predicts growth in home equity financing industry in 2025, citing positive trends and major transitions ahead.
news.summary: A tech company based in Boston, Hometap, has unveiled its 2025 outlook report titled "Home Equity Investments: The Tipping Point for Alternative Financing." The report predicts a continuation of the robust industry growth seen in the previous year, with significant momentum expected in 2025. Hometap highlights key advancements in the capital markets and regulatory environment shaping the sector. The company is known for pioneering debt-free home equity financing for American homeowners.

news.headline: Protect AI launches channel partner program in Seattle for security and AI-focused resellers and distributors, offering resources for threat detection and vulnerability management. (Character count: 148)
news.summary: Protect AI is providing partners with essential tools to enhance AI security by offering continuous threat detection, vulnerability management, and efficient response strategies. This initiative aims to safeguard AI systems against potential risks and ensure their resilience.

news.headline: Thryv promotes Cameron Lessard to VP of Corporate Development and Strategy, in charge of M&A, Treasury, capital raising, and investor communication. Lessard joined in 2020 and previously served as AVP.
news.summary: Thryv®, a major provider of small business sales and marketing software listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol THRY, has promoted Cameron Lessard to the position of Vice President, Corporate Development and Strategy. Lessard, who joined the company in 2020 and previously held the role of AVP of Treasury, Corporate Development, and Investor Relations, will now oversee M&A activities, treasury operations, capital raising initiatives, and communication with institutional investors. This move follows Lessard's crucial contribution to the company since his appointment.

news.headline: IKS Health launches Scribble Now at ViVE 2025, adding to its AI clinical documentation suite, enabling accurate notes in real-time.
news.summary: Dallas-based company IKS Health has introduced Scribble Now, the newest component of their Scribble Suite, at the ViVE 2025 event held from February 16-19. This real-time documentation tool is part of their AI clinical documentation suite, allowing healthcare providers to generate precise notes while prioritizing patient care. By unveiling this addition, IKS Health aims to enhance the range of services offered to clinicians. At the event, company executives will be presenting Scribble Now alongside other innovative solutions.

news.headline: Wrap unveils Managed Safety and Response (MSR) Connected Ecosystem in Virginia after Governor Youngkin's announcement. Early Adopter Program launches in VA, with defense tech drones, body cameras, and AI integration. International expansion expected.
news.summary: After Governor Youngkin's recent announcement in November, Virginia has officially launched an Early Adopter Program. This program will introduce cutting-edge defense technology innovations, including drones, body cameras, and AI integration. The program is highly anticipated and will be followed by an expansion into international markets. This initiative marks a significant step in advancing Virginia's technological prowess and is expected to attract a wide range of participants. Stay tuned for updates on this groundbreaking program.

news.headline: Mondelēz International's survey finds 71% of global consumers view sharing snacks as a way to connect with loved ones.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 13, 2025, Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) unveiled insights from the sixth annual State of Snacking™ report. This study delves into consumer trends worldwide, focusing on snacking habits. Timed with Valentine’s Day, the survey revealed that 71% of consumers globally view sharing snacks as a form of expressing love and connection.

news.headline: Binance's $1.5B fine made up most of DOJ's record $2.4B settlement. In total, Binance faces a $4.3B penalty for serious violations.
news.summary: A substantial amount is included in a broader $4.3 billion fine levied on Binance for significant violations.

news.headline: Lockheed Martin CEO and CFO to discuss at Citi's conference on Feb. 20 at 8-8:40 a.m. ET. (source: PRNewswire)
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on February 13, 2025, the Chairman, President, and CEO of Lockheed Martin, Jim Taiclet, along with CFO Jay Malave, are set to engage in a fireside chat at Citi's 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference. The event is scheduled for Thursday, February 20, from 8:00 a.m. to 8:40 a.m. Eastern Time. This discussion will be live-streamed, providing insights into Lockheed Martin's strategies to a global audience.

news.headline: GoPro partners with Kimpex to distribute products in Canada to over 2,300 dealers.
news.summary: Kimpex, a leading distributor of powersports products in Canada, has partnered with GoPro, Inc. (NASDAQ: GPRO) to provide their network of over 2,300 dealers with GoPro products. This partnership was announced on February 13, 2025, in San Mateo, California.

news.headline: U.S. Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor visits St. Thomas University, engaging with students, faculty, and community members in Miami Gardens, Florida on February 13, 2025.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Miami Gardens, Florida, St. Thomas University (STU) welcomed U.S. Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor for a range of events involving students, faculty, and community leaders. The visit included formal and informal gatherings, allowing for interactions with various members of the university and local leadership. Throughout the day, Justice Sotomayor engaged in discussions and exchanges, providing a unique opportunity for the university community to interact with a prominent figure.

news.headline: UST Health partners with EHC Consulting to fast-track healthcare cloud migration in 2025 and beyond.
news.summary: In an effort to facilitate the widespread use of cloud healthcare services in 2025 and beyond, collaboration is being leveraged to streamline the process. Recently, UST, a prominent digital transformation solutions company based in ALISO VIEJO, California, announced a strategic partnership with EHC Consulting. This collaboration aims to enhance cloud-managed services and propel their adoption in the healthcare sector. The partnership signifies a significant step towards achieving this goal and signifies a shift towards accelerating the integration of cloud technology in the industry. The move is anticipated to considerably impact the healthcare landscape, with the collaborative efforts set to pave the way for a more efficient and futuristic approach to healthcare services.

news.headline: Tillamook Co-op celebrates 116 years by giving away boatload of cheese for National Cheddar Day.
news.summary: Celebrating its rich 116-year history, Tillamook County Creamery Association from Tillamook, Oregon, marks National Cheddar Day on February 13, 2025. The award-winning cooperative invites dairy enthusiasts to participate. The cooperative boasts an impressive legacy of producing delectable dairy products.

news.headline: Sterling to release Q4 and full year 2024 results on Feb 25, 2025 after market close.
news.summary: Sterling Infrastructure, Inc. (NasdaqGS: STRL) based in The Woodlands, Texas, revealed its intentions to disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year of 2024 on Tuesday, February 25, 2025. The announcement is scheduled to be made post the market activities on that day.

news.headline: New unlined bra by Cacique Intimates, Smart Lift, has 65 sizes, took 4 years to develop. Designed to lift and shape.
news.summary: After 4 years of development, Cacique Intimates has launched a groundbreaking unlined bra in Columbus, Ohio. This new bra, available in 65 sizes, showcases the brand's expertise in catering to large cup and large bust customers. It incorporates the best elements from two popular Cacique bra frames to provide superior lift and shaping. The innovative design aims to revolutionize the way women experience comfort and support, marking a significant milestone for the brand.

news.headline: Global wearable payments market was valued at $46.9 billion in 2023, projected to reach $393.4 billion by 2033 at 23.7% CAGR.
news.summary: The "Wearable Payments Market" report by Allied Market Research states that the market was valued at $46.9 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $393.4 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 23.7% from 2024 to 2033. Key growth drivers include the increasing adoption of contactless payment solutions and supportive government policies. However, challenges like limited battery life and device reliability may hinder market growth. Opportunities lie in the utilization of NFC, RFID, and host card emulation technology. This market analysis covers various wearable payment devices, technologies (NFC, RFID, QR codes), and applications across different sectors like grocery stores, restaurants, and entertainment centers.

news.headline: Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) sees Q4 EPS rise to $1.66, revenue beats at $7.36 billion, with Electric Utilities income up to $1.238 billion. Gas Utilities income rises to $231 million.
news.summary: Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) announced a fourth-quarter adjusted EPS of $1.66, marking an increase from $1.51 in the previous year and aligning with market expectations. Total revenues reached $7.36 billion, surpassing the projected $7.33 billion. The Electric Utilities and Infrastructure segment saw a rise in adjusted segment income to $1.238 billion from $1.115 billion compared to the prior year, primarily attributed to growth from rate hikes and riders. Conversely, the Gas Utilities and Infrastructure segment reported an adjusted segment income of $231 million for the quarter, up from $192 million in the fourth quarter of 2023. For further information, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global TDI market valued at $12 billion in 2024, set to reach $17 billion by 2034 with 3.5% CAGR. Demand driven by flexible polyurethane foams in automotive, furniture, and construction industries. Industry trends focus on sustainability, innovations in manufacturing, and increased applications in developing regions like Asia-Pacific, with potential challenges in raw material price volatility and regulatory compliance. Opportunities lie in eco-friendly solutions, recycling technologies, and strategic collaborations to meet evolving consumer preferences for high-performance materials.
news.summary: The global Toluene Diisocyanates (TDI) market was valued at approximately $12 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $17 billion by 2034, with a 3.5% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) from 2025 to 2034. The growth is driven by rising demand for flexible polyurethane foams across industries such as automotive, furniture, and construction. Manufacturers are investing in sustainable and eco-friendly production techniques, although challenges like raw material price volatility and environmental regulations persist. Opportunities for growth are prominent in developing regions due to industrialization and urbanization trends. The construction sector is a significant TDI consumer, while the automotive and furniture industries are also driving demand with advancements in manufacturing technologies. Key challenges include raw material price fluctuations, regulatory compliance costs, and limited awareness of non-traditional TDI applications. The market is expected to expand in developing regions like Asia-Pacific and through innovations in eco-friendly solutions and recycling technologies. Strategic collaborations within the supply chain and adapting to evolving consumer preferences for high-performance materials are crucial for sustained growth in the TDI market.

news.headline: Wall Street analysts expect Coinbase to report Q4 earnings of $2.13/share and revenue of $1.84 billion, compared to $1.04/share and $953.79 million in the year-ago period. Coinbase stock rose 3% to $274.90.
news.summary: Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Feb. 13, 2025, after markets close. Analysts anticipate earnings of $2.13 per share, a significant rise from $1.04 per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.84 billion, surpassing the $953.79 million reported a year earlier. Coinbase exceeded revenue predictions in seven of the last 10 quarters, despite missing estimates in Q3. In the latest trading session, COIN stocks saw a 3% increase to end at $274.90. For detailed analyst ratings and updates, readers can visit Benzinga's website.

news.headline: American Electric Power missed Q4 revenue at $4.70 billion but beat profit forecasts at $1.24 EPS. Reaffirms FY25 outlook of $5.75-$5.95 EPS.
news.summary: American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) announced fourth-quarter revenue of $4.70 billion, which fell short of the expected $4.88 billion. Within their segments, energy distribution saw a 4.0% increase in the Vertically Integrated Utilities segment and a significant 10.3% rise in the Transmission & Distribution Utilities segment compared to the previous year. Commercial load grew by 10.6% in 2024 due to economic expansion in their service area. Adjusted operating earnings for the quarter rose to $660.1 million from $646.9 million the previous year. Specifically, earnings from Vertically Integrated Utilities increased to $275.5 million from $237.8 million, while AEP Transmission Holdco rose to $166.3 million from $159.3 million in the same quarter last year. The adjusted EPS was $1.24, exceeding the expected $1.22. For the FY25 Outlook, American Electric Power reiterated an adjusted EPS range of $5.75 - $5.95, compared to the anticipated $5.88.

news.headline: Biogen beats Q4 estimates with $3.44 EPS, $2.46B sales, but MS revenue drops 8%. Tysabri sales fall to $415.4M.
news.summary: Biogen Inc (NASDAQ:BIIB) exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company reported an adjusted EPS of $3.44, marking a 17% increase and surpassing the expected $3.35. Sales for the quarter reached $2.46 billion, showing a 2% growth on a constant currency basis and 3% on a reported basis, beating the anticipated $2.40 billion. Despite a revenue decline of 8% in multiple sclerosis segment, totaling $1.07 billion (down 9% on constant currency), sales for the multiple sclerosis drug Tysabri dropped from $464.7 million to $415.4 million. Biogen projected an adjusted EPS of $15.25-$16.25 for full-year 2025.

news.headline: National Association of Water Companies celebrates 130 years by ringing NYSE bell to honor safe, reliable water access.
news.summary: In New York, NAWC will mark its 130th anniversary by ringing the opening bell at the NYSE. The event celebrates the organization's dedication to providing safe and dependable water and wastewater services.

news.headline: EVPassport and CBRE partner to install 3,600 EV chargers at 600 sites in the US for multifamily and hospitality properties.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, EVPassport and CBRE have joined forces to offer EV charging solutions for multifamily and hospitality properties in North America. Through this agreement, CBRE will assist in installing 3,600 EV chargers at 600 sites in the US. This partnership aims to benefit property owners and operators by facilitating the transition to electric vehicles.

news.headline: USIC has been named one of America's Best Large Employers in Forbes' 2025 list, based on survey of over 217,000 employees.
news.summary: USIC, LLC, a leading underground utility damage prevention company based in Indianapolis, has recently been recognized as one of America's Best Large Employers in Forbes' 2025 list. Published on February 12, 2025, the list features top employers based on an independent survey conducted in partnership with Statista. With over 217,000 employees in the U.S., USIC’s inclusion on this prestigious list highlights its commitment to providing a positive work environment. For more details, the list can be accessed on Forbes website.

news.headline: Pioneer Power renews $2 million on-site power service agreement with U.S. retailer for 3 years.
news.summary: An industry leader in distributed energy resources and power generation equipment, Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) renewed and extended a service agreement with a major U.S. retailer. The new three-year deal solidifies their commitment to providing on-site power services to the retailer. Pioneer is known for its expertise in manufacturing, servicing, and integrating energy solutions, including mobile electric vehicle charging setups. This agreement underscores the Company’s dedication to delivering reliable energy services to its clients.
